item.title: 3 Targeted Oil Plays as the Iran Crisis Lifts Crude
item.description: Military action against Iran is spiking oil and LNG prices. Halliburton, Baker Hughes, and YPF are three oil stocks positioned to benefit from the dis...

item.title: Solar Flare: A Perfect Storm for Solar Stocks
item.description: Strong earnings and new growth in AI are fueling SolarEdge's recovery, while Enphase's operational excellence positions it for a strong 2026.

item.title: The $650 Billion AI Surge Is Here—2 Semiconductor ETFs to Play It
item.description: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH) offers targeted exposure to industry leaders, while iShares' SOXX provides broad exposure to the sector.

item.title: Target’s 2026 Turnaround: Analysts Bullish as Growth Returns
item.description: Target is poised to rebound in 2026 and could set a one-year high before mid-year, driven by outperformance, a return to growth, and analysts' sentime...

item.title: Vertiv: A Market Breather for an AI Infrastructure Leader
item.description: Vertiv's role as a provider of essential power and cooling for the AI build-out is confirmed by its substantial and rapidly growing order backlog.
